title: Ukrainians take to the streets after Zelenskyy ousts defense minister in surprise shake-up
summary_full: Ukrainian protesters took to the streets of Kyiv on Thursday, decrying Zelenskyy's surprise decision to dismiss Defense Minister Mykhailo Fedorov.
summary_public: Ukrainian protesters took to the streets of Kyiv on Thursday, decrying Zelenskyy's surprise decision to dismiss Defense Minister Mykhailo Fedorov.

UA.label: negative
UA.evidence: Ukrainians take to the streets after Zelenskyy ousts defense minister
